prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically discusses registered provider social housing stock and related statistics that pertain exclusively to data collected in England. It outlines housing units, rents, and trends applicable to the social housing framework governed by English regulations.
